title: DBiT Multiome
description: DBiT multiome dataset viewer with RNA and ATAC modalities.
citation: Zhang, D. et al. Spatial dynamics of brain development and neuroinflammation. Nature 647, 213-227 (2025).

title: CODEX
citation: Goltsev, Y. et al. Deep Profiling of Mouse Splenic Architecture with CODEX Multiplexed Imaging. Cell 174, 968-981.e15 (2018).

title: MERFISH (coronal)
citation: Yao, Z. et al. A high-resolution transcriptomic and spatial atlas of cell types in the whole mouse brain. Nature 624, 317-332 (2023).

title: MERFISH (sagittal)
citation: Yao, Z. et al. A high-resolution transcriptomic and spatial atlas of cell types in the whole mouse brain. Nature 624, 317-332 (2023).

title: CosMx
citation: He, S. et al. High-plex imaging of RNA and proteins at subcellular resolution in fixed tissue by spatial molecular imaging. Nat. Biotechnol. 40, 1794-1806 (2022).

title: Xenium Mouse Pup
citation: 10x Genomics. Mouse Pup Preview Data: Xenium Mouse Tissue Atlassing Panel 1 Standard. https://www.10xgenomics.com/datasets/mouse-pup-preview-data-xenium-mouse-tissue-atlassing-panel-1-standard

title: Xenium Human Pancreas (Adenocarcinoma)
description: Human pancreas with adenocarcinoma Xenium dataset viewer.
citation: 10x Genomics. Xenium Human Pancreatic Dataset Explorer. https://www.10xgenomics.com/products/xenium-human-pancreatic-dataset-explorer

title: HybISS Mouse Pup
description: Human pancreas with adenocarcinoma dataset viewer using HybISS technology.
citation: Manno, G. L. et al. Molecular architecture of the developing mouse brain. Nature 1-5 (2021) doi:10.1038/s41586-021-03775-x.

title: CARTANA Mouse EAE
description: Mouse EAE model dataset viewer using CARTANA technology.
citation: Kukanja, P. et al. Cellular architecture of evolving neuroinflammatory lesions and multiple sclerosis pathology. Cell (2024) doi:10.1016/j.cell.2024.02.030.

title: Xenium Human Kidney
description: Human kidney preview dataset viewer using Xenium technology.
citation: 10x Genomics. Human Kidney Preview Data: Xenium Human Multi-Tissue and Cancer Panel 1 Standard. https://www.10xgenomics.com/datasets/human-kidney-preview-data-xenium-human-multi-tissue-and-cancer-panel-1-standard

title: Xenium Fetal Lung
description: Xenium fetal lung dataset viewer for acute neonatal lung injury across development and disease severity.
citation: Frum, T. et al. Clinical Interventions and Inflammatory Signaling Shape the Transcriptional and Cellular Architecture of the Early Postnatal Lung. bioRxiv 2025.10.17.683116 (2025) doi:10.1101/2025.10.17.683116. https://pmc.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov/articles/PMC12633012/

title: Xenium Human Lung Fibrosis
description: Xenium dataset from human fibrotic lung tissue.
citation: Vannan, A. et al. Spatial transcriptomics identifies molecular niche dysregulation associated with distal lung remodeling in pulmonary fibrosis. Nat. Genet. 57, 647-658 (2025).

title: Human Lung (LNG1-LNG6)
description: KaroSpace viewer for a human lung dataset spanning regions LNG1, LNG2, LNG3, LNG5, and LNG6.
citation: Firsova, A. B. et al. Spatial single-cell atlas reveals regional variations in healthy and diseased human lung. Nat. Commun. 16, 9745 (2025).

title: Xenium Acute Neonatal Lung Injury
description: Xenium dataset from acute neonatal lung injury.
citation: Mallapragada, S. et al. A spatial transcriptomic atlas of acute neonatal lung injury across development and disease severity. Am. J. Physiol.-Lung Cell. Mol. Physiol. 329, L376-L388 (2025).
